title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Marines, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Kaido, Kid as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With two emperors down, everyone is curious about the two who remain. What do these polar opposites have in mind during this turbulent era?!

dialogue.text: Can any sword become a BLACK BLADE...?!! Many questions still remain unanswered when it comes to blades like you and Shusui.. is Haki alone really enough...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This collection emphasizes the absolute power of Kaido, King of the Beasts!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We finally got to see Kailo's go-to hybrid form in his clash with Luffy and the gang. You can almost hear his confident laugh as you gaze upon his/ mighty frame.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
